title: Rootless container created with network will not start on podman-3.0.1-6
body:
<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
Rootless container want to start while attaching it to a network

OS
redhat-release-8.4-0.6.el8.x86_64

Kernel
4.18.0-305.3.1.el8_4.x86_64
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Set cgroups v2
grubby --update-kernel=ALL --args="systemd.unified_cgroup_hierarchy=1"; shutdown -r 0

2. Enable linger
loginctl enable-linger ctest01

3. Build rootless-cni-infra via the ctest01 user
Download Containerfile & rootless-cni-infra
chmod 755 rootless-cni-infra
podman build -t rootless-cni-infra .

4. Create network
podman network create --subnet 192.168.3.0/28 --gateway 192.168.3.1 test01

5. Run container with network, test01
podman run -d --name test01 --hostname test01.example.lan --net test01 --ip 192.168.3.10 ubi8-init
Error: container_linux.go:367: starting container process caused: process_linux.go:495: container init caused: rootfs_linux.go:76: mounting "/home/ctest01/.config/cni/net.d" to rootfs at "/etc/cni/net.d" caused: operation not permitted: OCI permission denied

6. Run container with network, test01 with debug flag
podman run -d --log-level debug --name test01 --hostname test01.example.lan --net test01 --ip 192.168.3.10 ubi8-init
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug          
DEBU[0000] Called run.PersistentPreRunE(podman run -d --log-level debug --name test01 --hostname test01.example.lan --net test01 --ip 192.168.3.10 ubi8-init) 
DEBU[0000] Reading configuration file "/usr/share/containers/containers.conf"

DefaultCapabilities:[NET_RAW CHOWN DAC_OVERRIDE FOWNER FSETID KILL NET_BIND_SERVICE SETFCAP SETGID SETPCAP SETUID SYS_CHROOT] DefaultSysctls:[net.ipv4.ping_group_range=0 0] DefaultUlimits:[] DefaultMountsFile: DNSServers:[] DNSOptions:[] DNSSearches:[] EnableKeyring:true EnableLabeling:true Env:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin TERM=xterm] EnvHost:false HTTPProxy:true Init:false InitPath: IPCNS:private LogDriver:k8s-file LogSizeMax:-1 NetNS:slirp4netns NoHosts:false PidsLimit:2048 PidNS:private SeccompProfile:/usr/share/containers/seccomp.json **Describe the results you received:**
Error: container_linux.go:367: starting container process caused: process_linux.go:495: container init caused: rootfs_linux.go:76: mounting "/home/ctest01/.config/cni/net.d" to rootfs at "/etc/cni/net.d" caused: operation not permitted: OCI permission denied

And the container gets created but doesn't start

**Describe the results you expected:**
podman run -d --name test01 --hostname test01.example.lan --net test01 --ip 192.168.3.10 ubi8-init
160ff79ffab3538a85e0732e423f43b943d09fc82c11ac95964032744940c47a

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**
```
Version:      3.0.2-dev
API Version:  3.0.0
Go Version:   go1.15.13
Built:        Tue Jun  8 09:52:06 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```
